Reconstructing Amelia, Kimberly McCreight, really interesting read.

story begins with Amelia's apparent suicide, when Kate told news.
believing that daughter would commit suicide, Kate takes role detective daughter's life, trying identify what happened days leading death.
While follow Kate search, months after incident, also given Amelia's thoughts month leading death.
massive lover crime books, this story perfect blend crime with teenage angst motherly love.
fascinating perception events through teenage girl's eyes then easy interpreted another somewhat absent mother.
Without getting deep, does help realise that maybe your parents aren't always guys, that sometimes these teenage troubles aren't always world.
It's hard talk about this book without gushing about whole story line won't slip events, need fear.
What will that everything seems along.
Kate issues own, secrets that kept from Amelia, just same Amelia things from mother both with their best intentions heart.
Each chapter guessing what happened, came with countless what thought plausible story lines incentives characters kill Amelia.
ending, only becomes apparent last couple chapters, right beside Kate figured same time.
found myself becoming attached these characters, obviously easy life.
From Kate's chapters learn struggles being single parent having successful career; from Amelia's view could sometimes relate some typical school behaviour, could sympathise with easy become total involved something comfortable with.
recommend this book anyone likes novel with mystery solve, love read about family relationships.
This book covers many topics, feel really relevant today's generation where these issues widely discussed twitter tumblr etc.
definitely teenagers read this book, although seems like novel premise, actual sheds light many important issues, helps show that there many different ways interpret situation.
